reviews.comment:
Paso obligado pero da gusto. Muy limpio y ordenado. Con centershop y gasolinera.

A must-see, but a pleasant one. Very clean and tidy. With a convenience store and gas station.

reviews.comment:
Estación bien ubicada, parada obligada a cargar combustible, falta variedad de artículos d Kiosko, la imagen se ha quedado un poco en.el.tiempo, necesita un cambio.
Atención cumple con lo básico de una estación. Los vendedores no deberían fumar a la vista de los clientes están con la ropa muy cerca del.despacho d combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The station is well-located and a necessary stop for fueling. However, the convenience store lacks variety, and the image is a bit outdated; it needs updating. The service meets basic station requirements. The vendors shouldn't smoke in full view of customers, as they are too close to the fuel pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnXzYteGZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Trato regular ...los playeros.cumplen ordenes.al ser socio del automovil club deberian dar alojamiento.la gomeria el jueves a la tarde no estaba abierta y habia clientes con necesidades de arreglos.

(Translated by Google)
Average service...the beach attendants follow orders. As a member of the automobile club, they should provide lodging. The tire shop was closed on Thursday afternoon, and there were customers needing repairs.
